case_title: MOHAMED BELMELIANI VS. KEVIN V. STARELLI et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT , SENT TO DEFENDANT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT RONALD NEUMAN, ONLY TO JUN-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT RONALD NEUMAN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMELIANI, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT NEUMAN, RONALD
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BELMELIANI, MOHAMED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-08-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STARELLI, KEVIN V.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT RONALD NEUMAN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO RONALD NEUMAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BELMELIANI, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT STARELLI, KEVIN V. NEUMAN, RONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMELIANI, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT STARELLI, KEVIN V.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMELIANI, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT NEUMAN, RONALD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE MARKED: FORWARD TIME EXPIRED - RETURN TO SENDER COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEUMAN, RONALD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMELIANI, MOHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARELLI, KEVIN V. $1,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,040.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE CLAIM AGAINST RONALD NEUMAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
